mapper.insert:
/* StandardDisplayCategoryConnectCommandRepository.insertConnectList */
INSERT INTO PR_STD_CTG_DISP_INFO ( STD_CTG_NO , DISP_CTG_NO , REP_CTG_YN , USE_YN , SITE_NO , DPML_NO , DEL_YN , SYS_REG_ID , SYS_REG_DTM , SYS_MOD_ID , SYS_MOD_DTM ) VALUES ( #{item.stdCtgNo} , #{item.dispCtgNo} , COALESCE(#{item.repCtgYn}, 'N') , COALESCE(#{item.useYn}, 'Y') , #{item.siteNo} , #{item.dpmlNo} , 'N' , COALESCE(#{item.sysRegId}, 'admin') , NOW() , COALESCE(#{item.sysModId}, 'admin') , NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (STD_CTG_NO, DISP_CTG_NO) DO UPDATE SET REP_CTG_YN = EXCLUDED.REP_CTG_YN , USE_YN = EXCLUDED.USE_YN , DEL_YN = 'N' , SYS_MOD_ID = EXCLUDED.SYS_MOD_ID , SYS_MOD_DTM = NOW()
